old_value: {"id":"smallhold-6sk","title":"Phase 0: Project Skeleton","description":"Bootstrap the entire Cargo workspace, config system, database layer, core ID generation, logging infrastructure, and CLI skeleton. This is the foundation everything else builds on — if the skeleton is wrong, every later phase pays for it. The CLI-first approach is deliberate: if 'smallhold persona create writer' produces a sane DB row, the data model is right.","design":"Single Cargo workspace. sqlx with compile-time query checking. sqlx-migrate for embedded migrations. clap v4 derive API. tracing + tracing-subscriber for structured logging. Custom snowflake generator (~50 lines with AtomicU64), no external dep.","acceptance_criteria":"smallhold init creates config.toml and DB with correct schema; smallhold persona create writer inserts a row in accounts with a valid RSA keypair; all SQLite PRAGMAs active; snowflake IDs are time-sortable 64-bit integers","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","owner":"mark@wolfssl.com","created_at":"2026-04-22T23:54:43Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-04-22T23:54:43Z","metadata":{},"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"","depends_on_id":"smallhold-2eb","type":"relates-to","created_at":"2026-04-22T17:25:24Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"","depends_on_id":"smallhold-2o6","type":"relates-to","created_at":"2026-04-22T17:25:14Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"","depends_on_id":"smallhold-4vg","type":"relates-to","created_at":"2026-04-22T17:25:15Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"","depends_on_id":"smallhold-8e8","type":"relates-to","created_at":"2026-04-22T16:58:52Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"","depends_on_id":"smallhold-8xq","type":"relates-to","created_at":"2026-04-22T16:58:19Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"","depends_on_id":"smallhold-cq9","type":"relates-to","created_at":"2026-04-22T17:25:23Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"","depends_on_id":"smallhold-d5r","type":"relates-to","created_at":"2026-04-22T16:58:07Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"","depends_on_id":"smallhold-lia","type":"relates-to","created_at":"2026-04-22T16:59:15Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"","depends_on_id":"smallhold-o1l","type":"relates-to","created_at":"2026-04-22T16:58:29Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"","depends_on_id":"smallhold-p25","type":"relates-to","created_at":"2026-04-22T16:59:06Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"","depends_on_id":"smallhold-vl1","type":"relates-to","created_at":"2026-04-22T16:58:43Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
